impacts.title: RBI Digital Lending Compliance Deadline Q1 2026
impacts.pitch: We help NBFCs and digital lenders achieve RBI compliance fast — our RegTech platform delivers automated audit trails, real-time loan disbursement monitoring, and borrower KYC validation in under 24 hours, eliminating ₹50L fine risk before the Q1 2026 deadline.

impacts.title: UPI Payment Aggregator Licensing Mandate
impacts.pitch: We streamline RBI PA license applications for payment aggregators — our compliance suite automates the documentation, nodal account reconciliation, and transaction monitoring required for PA licensing, cutting preparation time from 6 months to 6 weeks.

impacts.title: SEBI Virtual Digital Asset Regulation Framework
impacts.pitch: We help crypto exchanges and VDA custodians meet SEBI's new regulatory framework — our AML/KYC platform handles client fund segregation, suspicious transaction reporting, and exchange registration documentation required by June 2026.

impacts.title: Account Aggregator Framework 10x Adoption Surge
impacts.pitch: We accelerate AA integration for NBFCs and banks — our financial data connector reduces Account Aggregator onboarding from 3 months to 3 weeks, enabling real-time credit decisioning and reducing NPA rates through better borrower visibility.

impacts.title: RBI NBFC Stress Test: 18 Firms Undercapitalized
impacts.pitch: We help undercapitalized NBFCs rebuild capital adequacy ratios — our treasury optimization and capital planning platform identifies portfolio rebalancing opportunities, models regulatory scenarios, and automates RBI remediation plan submissions.

impacts.title: e-KYC 2.0 Launch: Aadhaar-PAN Digital Identity for Finance
impacts.pitch: We integrate e-KYC 2.0 into your customer onboarding flow in under 2 weeks — our SDK connects Aadhaar biometrics, PAN validation, and CKYC registry in a single API call, reducing onboarding time by 80% and fraud drop-off by 45%.

impacts.title: India Fintech Raises $2.1B in Q4 FY2026 Despite Global Slowdown
impacts.pitch: We help fintech companies maximize investor returns post-funding — our financial infrastructure platform scales embedded finance, B2B payment rails, and insurance distribution capabilities so growth capital translates to measurable revenue expansion.
